reviews.comment:
Excelente atención especialmente en el servicompras, atendido por Lucas Galarza, muy amable!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, especially at the convenience store, where Lucas Galarza was very friendly!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURncDVYNGpnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy mala experiencia , me cobraron 500 pesos un termo de agua y se niegan a dar comprobante malisima atencion del empleado del shop lugar no recomendable para parar

(Translated by Google)
Very bad experience. They charged me 500 pesos for a thermos of water and refused to give a receipt. Terrible service from the shop employee. Not a place I would recommend stopping at.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURncTd6VUVBEAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) On the national route N*12 km 1881 is a YPF ACA service station. It is located 2 km from ITA IBATÉ (Corrientes).
Very good attention, very cordial, prices accessible within 24 hours and you can pay with plastics.

(Original)
En la ruta nacional N*12 km 1881 se encuentra  una estación de servicio YPF ACA. Está situada a 2 km de ITA IBATÉ (Corrientes).
Muy buena atención, muy cordiales, precios accesibles en el 24 hs y podes pagar con plásticos.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNna3BMay13RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy mala la higiene de los sanitarios, lleno de moscas etc

(Translated by Google)
The hygiene in the restrooms was very poor, full of flies, etc.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURBMWJ1eTJnRRAB

reviews.comment:
El sanitario de mujeres quedó muy chico y cuando lo tienen que limpiar se arma fila de 50m. Lo demás bastante aceptable y buena atención del personal

(Translated by Google)
The women's restroom is very small, and when it needs cleaning, there's a 50-meter queue. Otherwise, it's quite acceptable, and the staff is helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURBMGNXN29RRRAB
